hero.title: Start Today and Create
hero.description: Empowering organizations through world-class training, advanced technology solutions, and innovative internet services. Join Injaz to train and shape the future of professional excellence.

about.subtitle: About INJAZ CTC
about.title: We are Pioneers in
about.description: As experts in organizational professional services, we provide Consultancy & Training, and corporate structure design to guide leaders towards advanced solutions for a sustainable future.
about.approachDesc: We bridge the gap between training and real-world business environments. Our programs are designed to enhance skills through:
about.visionDesc: To be a center of excellence qualified to connect, meet, and share with the Global Community.
about.missionDesc: Contributing leaders to be at the heart of future business realities.
about.goalDesc: To achieve sustainable growth and become the market leader in training and consultancy.
about.whyDesc: We believe that training is not just information transfer, but a comprehensive transformation journey for individuals and organizations.

features.globalDesc: We offer internationally accredited training programs aligned with the highest global standards in management and technology.
features.expertsDesc: Our team includes consultants and trainers with extensive field experience across various business sectors.
features.resultsDesc: We focus on practical application to ensure a real and sustainable return on your training investment.

training.title: Training Consultancy
training.homeDesc: Specialized programs designed to empower your workforce with the latest skills and industry certifications.
training.description: Customized training programs designed to meet the requirements of both individuals and organizations, delivered by qualified international professionals with extensive business experience.
features: Bespoke programs tailored to your specific organizational needs.
Academic and business experts from international backgrounds.
Flexible delivery and customized content development.

it.title: IT Solutions
it.homeDesc: Cutting-edge technology solutions to streamline your operations and drive digital transformation.
it.description: A leading managed services provider of IT support and maintenance, specializing in helping small and medium-sized businesses maintain robust technical infrastructures.
features: 24/7 Managed IT support and maintenance services.
Expertise in SME technical requirements and growth.
Robust infrastructure solutions for modern business.

online.title: Online Education
online.homeDesc: Seamless digital platforms and cloud services to help you reach a global audience.
online.description: Providing flexible e-Learning solutions for challenging times. We offer over 368 courses in Business, Management, and Computer Skills for individuals and organizations.
features: Focus on Business, Management, and IT skills.
Flexible learning platform for on-the-go education.

psychometric.title: Psychometric Test
psychometric.homeDesc: Advanced assessment tools that empower leaders and impact organizations by matching the right candidates to the right jobs.
psychometric.description: Advanced assessment tools that empower leaders and impact organizations by matching the right candidates to the right jobs with rapid, reliable results.
features: Quick and accurate results for leadership decisions.
Scientifically-backed matching of talent to roles.

descriptions.management: Developing strategic leadership and operational management skills.
descriptions.worklife: Achieving the perfect balance between professional demands and personal life.
descriptions.business: Advanced courses in business administration and international trade.
descriptions.media: Specialized media consultancy and corporate reputation management.
descriptions.hr: Strategies for talent acquisition and human capital development.
descriptions.finance: Financial management, auditing, and accounting for non-financials.
descriptions.it: Modern IT certifications and software proficiency.
descriptions.customer: Excellence in customer service and the art of public dealing.
descriptions.languages: Language skill development programs for business and international communication.

leadingTeams.title: Leading High Performance Teams
leadingTeams.description: Teams often depend on how well the team operates. How are their problem-solving skills? Do they work well together? There have been hundreds of human beings function better and learn better in groups. If participants want to unleash the talent of their individual team members, this workshop is a leadership practices that work.
objectives: Identify and tapping into the twelve characteristics of an effective team.
Promote trust and rapport by exploring their team player style and how it impacts group dynamics.
Recognize the key elements that move a team from involvement to empowerment and how to give these elements to their team.
Develop strategies for dealing with team conflict and common situations.
Understand how action planning and analysis tools can help their team perform better.

managementSkills.title: Developing Management Skills
managementSkills.description: This program aims at enhancing the potential of individuals both as part of an organisation and as active members of a healthy society. Our focus is to provide unique services that respond to the demands of a competitive and challenging world.
objectives: Enhancing the potential of individuals within organizations.
Providing unique services responding to competitive demands.
Implementing realistic concepts and quality solutions.
Monitoring external environment and welcoming change.
Building long-term professional relationships.

strategicPlanning.title: Strategic Thinking and Planning
strategicPlanning.description: Strategic thinking and planning training teaches you how to make the most of the information you have, as well as how to present compelling arguments and clearly reason your way to success in the workplace, especially in an era of information overload.
objectives: Develop critical thinking by identifying the right style.
Strengthen and improve that style.
Work through the critical thinking process.
Develop and evaluate explanations.
Use effective reasoning techniques to avoid falling into common pitfalls and illogical traps.

changeManagement.title: Change Management
changeManagement.description: In this course, participants learn how to cope with continuous changes in the workplace, whether in organizational structure or technology, and turn challenges into opportunities for innovation.
objectives: Handle transition periods efficiently.
Learn to see change as an opportunity for motivation and innovation.
Handle change in a healthy and non-stressful way.

problemSolving.title: Problem Solving and Decision Making
problemSolving.description: This workshop helps you learn new ways to approach problem solving and develop practical ways to solve some of your most pressing problems, reaching win-win solutions through collaborative thinking.
objectives: Increase awareness of problem-solving steps and tools.
Distinguish root cause from symptoms.
Improve decision-making skills through identifying personal styles.
Improve ability to participate in collaborative problem-solving.
Recognize the top ten rules of good decision-making.

coachingPerformance.title: Coaching for Creative Performance
coachingPerformance.description: Coaching is based on a partnership that involves giving both support and challenging opportunities to employees. This workshop will help participants become better coaches, benefiting both the individual and the organization.
objectives: Understand how coaching can be used to develop their team.
Develop coaching skills that help improve individual performance.
Demonstrate the behaviors and practices of an effective coach.
Recognize employees' strengths and give them constructive feedback.
Identify employee problems and ways they can help to correct them.

personalDev.title: Personal Development
personalDev.description: Personal development is to improve your personal efficiency and your communication skills to develop yourself and your career, helping you interact positively and reduce stress in the workplace.
objectives: Develop self-esteem and assertiveness.
Make an impact at meetings and companies.
Respond constructively to criticism.
Manage anger in a positive way.
Map your time effectively.
Know yourself and your ability to be brilliant.

stressManagement.title: Stress Management
stressManagement.description: This program helps staff and senior managers deal with job burnout and stress, restoring their work-life balance to improve corporate performance and long-term growth.
objectives: Understand that stress is a positive and unavoidable part of life.
Recognize symptoms of chronic stress overload.
Identify situations and actions that cause the greatest stress.
Develop strategies for changing changeable stress factors.
Develop techniques for dealing with unchangeable situations.

creativeThinking.title: Creative Thinking
creativeThinking.description: Creative thinking is about exploring new ideas and generating innovative possibilities rather than relying on one traditional answer. Learn how to be creative in practical business solutions.
objectives: Make better decisions through critical thinking and creative problem solving.
Analyse different methods to achieve your objectives efficiently.
Present your ideas clearly to have maximum impact on stakeholders.
Apply creativity into practical business solutions.
Develop your personal decision-making toolkit.

emotionalIntelligence.title: Emotional Intelligence (EQ)
emotionalIntelligence.description: What makes great leaders extraordinary is their EQ. Learn to manage your emotions and understand others' to improve decision quality and team momentum in the workplace.
objectives: Connect effectively between physical and emotional health.
Manage the range of emotions with professional intelligence.
Recognise and develop essential EQ skills.
Validate emotions in others and master constructive emotional debate.
Apply EQ concepts to increase productivity in the workplace.

bodyLanguage.title: Understanding Body Language
bodyLanguage.description: Body language is key to building trust and credibility. Learn to read others' signals and control your own to ensure your verbal message aligns with your body language in all spheres of life.
objectives: Understand the impact of body language on building trust and credibility.
Learn to read signals from clients and colleagues.
Improve your personal body language to enhance your presence.
Use body language as an effective tool in sales and negotiation.
Align body language with speech to ensure clarity.

englishFoundation.title: Business English Foundation
englishFoundation.description: Equip yourself with the confidence and skills to communicate in proper English in business situations, including emails, presentations, and telephone etiquette.
objectives: Understand and write professional emails.
Deliver clear presentations in English.
Master telephone etiquette and visitor reception.
Negotiate and chair meetings in English.

businessWriting.title: Business Writing
businessWriting.description: Learn to get your message across 'first time right'. This course focuses on effective, clear business writing for professionals at all levels.
objectives: Write clear and concise documents for business objectives.
Adapt writing to the target audience's needs.
Enhance email and reporting communication.
Distinguish between formal and informal language.
Develop spelling, grammar, and professional writing skills.

technicalReport.title: Technical Report Writing
technicalReport.description: A specialized workshop for writing effective reports and proposals directly related to your field, designed for all managerial levels.
objectives: Value written reports as a communication tool.
Recognize and use professional report formats.
Use structured signposting to guide the reader.
Prepare reports that inform and persuade effectively.
Proofread work for clarity, conciseness, and correctness.

meetingMinutes.title: Minutes of Meetings
meetingMinutes.description: Accurate minutes are the memory of any successful meeting. Learn the essential skills and techniques to produce professional minutes.
objectives: Recognize the importance of accurate minute-taking.
Write minutes suitable for formal and informal meetings.
Develop listening and summarizing skills for documentation.
Remedy common challenges faced by minute-takers.

marketing.title: Marketing Consultancy
marketing.description: Understand and plan your marketing strategy through digital channels. We help you draft press releases and execute effective social media and email marketing campaigns.
objectives: Develop successful and competitive products.
Produce creative and effective marketing campaigns.
Master key digital marketing techniques.
Manage and execute digital marketing assignments efficiently.
Understand legal considerations in digital marketing.

communication.title: Communication Skills
communication.description: Effective communication is the key to business and personal success. Learn to express yourself clearly, influence others, and master the art of listening and body language.
objectives: Recognize and use advanced communication skills.
Adapt to different thinking styles and abilities.
Plan appropriate ways to influence and deliver messages.
Think and communicate creatively in all situations.
Leverage listening skills and body language for better impact.

managementSkills.title: HR Management Skills
managementSkills.description: Learn the latest trends in HR, including job specifications, core competencies, and behavioral interviewing techniques to find and keep the best talent.
objectives: Recognize the changing role of HR professionals.
Write job specifications and identify competencies.
Master behavioral description interviewing techniques.
Deal with compensation, benefits, and employee relations.
Make performance appraisals a cooperative process.

trainTrainer.title: Train The Trainer (TOT)
trainTrainer.description: Develop the skills to bring information to an audience in a way that engages, empowers, and encourages continued learning based on adult learning principles.
objectives: Understand participant needs and learning styles.
Write measurable objectives and evaluate sessions.
Develop an effective training style and use aids.
Conduct practical group training sessions.

jobDescription.title: Writing Effective Job Description
jobDescription.description: Create dynamic and functional job descriptions that define major areas of a position and help avoid assignment refusal through careful fact analysis.
objectives: Identify specific tasks and completion methods.
Define the purpose and responsibilities of the job.
Understand relationships of the job to others.
Define qualifications and job objectives clearly.
Describe functional relationships and roles within a team.

awareness.title: Financial Awareness For The Non-Financial People
awareness.description: Designed for professionals who want to better understand the financial side of business, covering budgeting, forecasting, and credit control to enhance organizational success.
objectives: Finance for non-finance professionals.
Budgeting and forecasting principles.
Credit control and collection procedures.
Specialized financial report writing.
Effective debt collection management.

word.title: Microsoft Word
word.description: Master the art of creating professional documents, reports, and letters with the world's most popular word processor. Learn formatting, styling, and advanced document management.
objectives: Create and format professional reports and official documents.
Apply styles and themes for consistent branding.
Incorporate tables, images, and smart graphics effectively.
Master page setup, section breaks, and printing options.
Utilize mail merge for personalized bulk communications.

excelBasics.title: Microsoft Excel Basics
excelBasics.description: Learn to use spreadsheets for calculations, data analysis, and reporting. This course provides the foundation for using MS Excel functions and features to solve business issues.
objectives: Understand the overall concept of spreadsheets.
Create, edit, format, and print spreadsheets.
Learn basic and intermediate MS Excel formulas.
Export graphs and charts for professional reporting.
Organize and manage large data sets efficiently.

powerpointIntermediate.title: Microsoft PowerPoint (Intermediate)
powerpointIntermediate.description: Improve your presentation skills to create engaging, visually rich, and interactive presentations. Learn advanced picture handling and Smart Art integration.
objectives: Manage PowerPoint files and custom templates.
Add professional finishing touches to slides.
Insert and customize Smart Art, tables, and charts.
Create interactive and collaborative presentations.
Master technical delivery and presentation techniques.

outlookAdvanced.title: Microsoft Outlook (Advanced)
outlookAdvanced.description: Advanced tools for busy managers to manage emails and personal information. Includes features for calendar, tasks, and address book management.
objectives: Master advanced email features and automation rules.
Use advanced information management tools.
Handle data management and archiving efficiently.
Enhance Outlook security and privacy settings.
Manage complex schedules and task assignments.

etiquette.title: Etiquette for Excellence Customer Service
etiquette.description: Build your credibility as a competent and confident professional through good business etiquette. Learn to make great first impressions and develop relationships with ease.
objectives: Feel more confident in business communications.
Understand appropriate workplace dress codes.
Handle business meetings and professional lunches.
Avoid behavior that might offend clients or colleagues.
Master the art of making great first impressions.

telephone.title: Telephone Skills and Customer Care
telephone.description: The telephone remains one of the most effective ways to reach customers directly. Master telephone etiquette and telemarketing skills to build better client relationships.
objectives: Increase telephone etiquette and vocal confidence.
Learn key telemarketing and sales tips.
Use the telephone as a powerful sales and support tool.
Ensure professional follow-ups and return calls.
Deliver effective sales presentations over the phone.
Build customer confidence during telephone interactions.

overview.title: Languages
overview.description: Language is more than just communication; it's a bridge to understanding and successful business relationships. Injaz CTC teaches you to speak and write effectively, removing barriers and nurturing lasting ties.
objectives: Communicate effectively across different languages.
Master professional reading and writing skills.
Build strong cultural ties and understanding.
Set up and nurture economic and business relationships.

overview.title: Certification Courses, a path to career progression
overview.description: Are you an ambitious individual who wants to climb the career ladder in your professional life? Whether you have just finished the University or you are working but are keen to move up in the organization and believe that you require further professional training to fulfill your career ambitions, then we have the answer for you.
objectives: Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA)
Certified Management Accountant (CMA)
Certified Public Accountant (CPA)
Certified Internal Auditor (CIA)
Senior/Professional Human Resources (SPHR/PHR)
Certified Manager (CM)

associations.title: Associations & Partners
associations.description: INJAZ CTC is a Training and Development Consultancy with the aim of enhancing the potential of individuals both as part of an organisation and as active members of a healthy society. Our focus is to provide unique services that respond to the demands of a competitive and challenging world.
associations.quote: Remember... People who work and live to their potential are the ones who can change the world!
associations.expertise: INJAZ CTC Training Consultancy is an expert firm for development in the field of Management, Human Resources and Health & Safety environment. We provide to our partners the realistic concepts, the quality solutions & the methodologies to help them maintain external environment, monitor and welcome change.
associations.offer: INJAZ CTC offers a range of Consulting, Training & Services to a large and variants organization, both private and public, facing to build life long relationship.

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Skills?
cta.description: Join thousands of professionals who have transformed their careers with Injaz CTC programs.

contact.subtitle: Please feel free to contact us by any means you prefer.
contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below and one of our consultants will get back to you shortly.
contact.name: Full Name
